notes: v0.23.0 — LANCE RAILGUN v2 + proper PvP cloak. Hitscan beam replaced with a dodgeable projectile (1800-2400 px/s, charge-scaled). Boss occlusion built in — no more punching through to the far side. DECOY HOLO (Space) is now properly asymmetric: local player sees own ship + decoy normally, opponent sees only the holo (looks identical to a real ship, no scan-lines / no flicker / real-looking HP bar) while the real ship is fully invisible.
